entry.title: RES26-134 (Honolulu): INTRO → CCL
entry.content:
APPROVING THE EXPENDITURE OF CLEAN WATER AND NATURAL LANDS FUNDS TO ACQUIRE A PERPETUAL CONSERVATION EASEMENT OVER TWELVE PARCELS OF LAND KNOWN AS KE KĪPUKA O KALAEUILA, TAX MAP KEYS: (1) 5-6-003:011, 019, 020, 021, 022, 023, 024, 026, 030, 031, 046, AND 049 IN KAHUKU, O‘AHU, HAWAI‘I.

Status: INTRO → CCL

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
